expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task status tracking, updates, and filtering.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status schema and persistence",
      "description": "As a product team, I want each task to store a status so that task progress persists for every task.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task schema stores a status field with allowed values pending, in progress, and done",
        "Existing tasks default to pending after migration or backfill",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/*task-status*.sql",
        "src/models/task.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Allow task status updates",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change a task status so that I can keep work progress current.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task status update action accepts pending, in progress, and done values",
        "Changing status saves the new value for the selected task",
        "Invalid status values are rejected",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/tasks/updateTaskStatus.ts",
        "src/routes/tasks.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show task status badges on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task card to display its current status so that I can scan progress quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards show a visible badge for pending, in progress, and done statuses",
        "Badge styling differs by status while preserving task readability",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskCard.tsx",
        "src/components/tasks/TaskStatusBadge.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add task status controls to task rows",
      "description": "As a user, I want status controls in the task list so that I can update tasks without leaving the list view.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each task row exposes a status control with pending, in progress, and done options",
        "Changing the control updates the task and refreshes the visible status badge",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskRow.tsx",
        "src/components/tasks/TaskStatusSelect.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Filter task list by status",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so that I can focus on active or completed work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list includes filter options for All, Pending, In Progress, and Done",
        "Selecting a filter updates the visible task list without affecting stored task data",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskListFilters.tsx",
        "src/pages/tasks/index.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}
